name: io.github.rhamblen/blender-mcp
title: Blender MCP Server
description: MCP server that gives AI assistants control over Blender — scene inspection, object/material editing, code execution, rendering, and asset import (fork of ahujasid/blender-mcp with Docker/streamable-http support)

environmentVariables.name: BLENDER_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Host where the Blender addon's command socket is listening (the machine running Blender, not this server)

environmentVariables.name: BLENDER_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port the Blender addon's command socket is listening on (default 9876)

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport to run: stdio (default, for local Claude Desktop use) or streamable-http (for Docker/network deployment)
